title: Descent for Multiple Cycles — Simultaneous r-fold Descent

analysis.object: T888: Descent for Multiple Cycles — Simultaneous r-fold Descent depth analysis

hodge_r_classes.description: For rank r: r Hodge classes in H^{2r}(E^r, Q)^{r,r}. T790 gives r algebraic cycles.

simultaneous_descent.description: Do r cycles descend SIMULTANEOUSLY via Berkovich descent?

product_descent.description: Berkovich descent for E^r = product of r Berkovich descents. Product manifold.
product_descent.reason: Product manifold descent = product of individual descents

formal_gaga_product.description: Formal GAGA for E^r: formal scheme on E^r algebraizes. Grothendieck EGA III applies.

r_fold_descent_proved.description: Simultaneous r-fold descent: T775 applied to E^r. r cycles descend simultaneously.

independence_preserved.description: Independence of r cycles preserved under descent (Berkovich is faithfully flat)

t888_theorem.description: T888: Simultaneous r-fold descent works. T775 applied to E^r gives r independent algebraic 0-cycles. Independence preserved by faithful flatness of Berkovich. T888.
t888_theorem.reason: Simultaneous descent for r cycles. T888.

analysis.theorem: T888: Descent for Multiple Cycles — Simultaneous r-fold Descent (S1168).

key_theorem: T888: Descent for Multiple Cycles — Simultaneous r-fold Descent (S1168).
